work_unit: SZ-BG-M-008: Non-PNG images skip all scaling/tiling/enhancement
situation: ocr-internal.ts uses parsePngSize() which only handles PNG header format. JPEG/WebP images get null → recognizeWithInternalApi falls through to basic upload-only OCR (no upscale, no tiling, no contrast enhancement). ocrRegion also returns empty for non-PNG. This means JPEG screenshots and WebP product photos get significantly worse recognition quality.
action: Replaced local parsePngSize with imported parseImageSize from vision-adapter.ts which handles both PNG (IHDR header) and JPEG (SOF0/SOF2 marker scan). Removed dead parsePngSize function. Added clarifying comment at fallback path for truly unrecognized formats (WebP etc.).
outcome_evidence: Commit 322f5e0 on auto/opt-background-1783213292. parseImageSize imported and used at both call sites (recognizeWithInternalApi line 539, ocrRegion line 590). parsePngSize removed. Pushed to origin.
next_suggestion: Next pending fix: SZ-SP-M-001 (Draw mode replaces all regions instead of appending) in sidepanel

audit_findings.finding: parsePngSize only parses PNG IHDR; JPEG/WebP images return null causing all upscale/tile/enhance paths to be skipped
audit_findings.remediation: Replace with parseImageSize from vision-adapter.ts which handles PNG + JPEG SOF markers
